jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Blue Beard
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired book cover featuring Bluebeard's wife, a young woman with long, flowing dark hair and a white nightgown, kneeling in terror before the open closet door. The closet is dimly lit, revealing a chilling scene of several lifeless women in elegant gowns, their bodies arranged against the blood-splattered walls. In her trembling hand, she holds the small key, stained with fresh blood that seems to glow faintly. The scene is set in the grand gallery of Bluebeard's castle, suggested by ornate, dark wood paneling and a glimpse of a long, shadowed hallway, all rendered in hand-painted watercolor style with soft, warm lighting to enhance the fairy tale atmosphere, focusing on the horror and suspense of the moment.

jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Cinderella; or, the little glass slipper
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor book cover illustration of Cinderella's arrival at the ball, warm soft lighting, fairy tale atmosphere. Cinderella, transformed and radiant in a gown of shimmering gold and silver cloth, adorned with jewels, is stepping out of a magnificent, golden coach. The coach, formerly a pumpkin, is pulled by six dappled grey horses, and a plump rat-turned-coachman with extravagant whiskers sits proudly in his seat. Lizards-turned-footmen in livery stand attentively behind. The King's son, a handsome prince with kind eyes, extends his hand to help her alight. Bystanders, including Cinderella's stepsisters in elaborate gowns, gaze in awe at Cinderella. The scene is set in front of a grand palace, bathed in the warm glow of lanterns. The overall mood is magical, enchanting, and filled with wonder.
